title: An Alan Smithee Film: Burn Hollywood Burn
original_title: An Alan Smithee Film: Burn, Hollywood, Burn
overview: Filmmaker Alan Smithee finds himself the unwilling puppet of a potentially bad big budget action film, for which he proceeds to steal the reels, and leaves the cast and crew in a frenzy.
